headline: Datadog Flags AI Complexity Risk As Shares Trade Below Valuation Estimates
summary: Datadog (NasdaqGS:DDOG) has released new research highlighting that operational complexity is now the main barrier to reliable AI at scale. The study finds most enterprises are running multiple AI models and complex workflows, which are linked to higher failure rates. The findings put Datadog's observability tools at the center of discussions on how to make large scale AI systems more dependable. Datadog enters this discussion with a market profile that already draws attention from...

headline: Datadog Announces GPU Monitoring to Help Businesses Optimize Spend and Performance as They Aim to Scale AI Projects
summary: The launch of Datadog’s GPU Monitoring helps teams plan capacity, troubleshoot issues quickly, prevent costly failures and avoid wasted spendNEW YORK, April 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc., (NASDAQ: DDOG), the leading AI-powered observability and security platform, today announced that GPU Monitoring is available to customers everywhere.
